title: Wo de Shixiong Tai Qiang Le

alternative_titles.en: My Senior Brother is Too Strong

synopsis:
Cultivator Lü Shaoqing, having unexpectedly acquired the immortal treasure "Spring and Autumn Ring," was branded a world-destroying demon by the righteous immortal alliance and relentlessly hunted down. He unexpectedly traveled back in time a thousand years, sharing a body with his killer. Deep within the enemy's lair, Lü Shaoqing, in order to survive, outwits and outmaneuvers his enemy to seize control of the body, while simultaneously anticipating their moves and amassing rare treasures, ultimately becoming the most disliked and dissolute figure in the righteous path! Meanwhile, the secrets of the cultivation world gradually surfaced, and Lü Shaoqing, calculating with his fingers, realized that history had already been altered!

(Source: Bilibili, translated)
